# MinkLoc3D: Point Cloud Based Large-Scale Place Recognition

- **Work ID:** `LPR-060`
- **Reviewed version:** `title:a2df964b725145d8`
- **Year / venue:** 2021 / WACV
- **Relevance:** `core_lpr`
- **Representative tier:** `ordinary`
- **Links:** [Paper](https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/WACV2021/html/Komorowski_MinkLoc3D_Point_Cloud_Based_Large-Scale_Place_Recognition_WACV_2021_paper.html) · [Reviewed official code](https://github.com/jac99/MinkLoc3D)

- [global_descriptor](../branches/global_descriptor.md)
- [global_descriptor/learning](../branches/global_descriptor--learning.md)

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** Oxford RobotCar, University Sector (U.S.), Residential Area (R.A.), Business District (B.D.), RobotCar Seasons — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–6, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2;Table I-IX
- **input_unit:** single ground-removed point-cloud submap downsampled to 4096 points, zero-centered and scaled to \[-1,1\] — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–5, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2;Table I-IX
- **invariances:** point-order permutation, no demonstrated rotation or translation invariance — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–5, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2;Table I-IX
- **representation:** sparse occupied-voxel tensor, 3D sparse Feature Pyramid Network, GeM pooling, 256-D global descriptor, Euclidean nearest-neighbor retrieval, triplet margin loss with batch-hard negative mining — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–4, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2;Table I-IX
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–8, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2;Table I-IX
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–8, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2;Table I-IX

> Information types distinguish author-reported facts, derived facts, researcher judgements, and agent inferences. The locator identifies the reviewed source; verbatim evidence remains in the private audit store.
